Cooper Flagg Ruled Out of Season Finale with Ankle Injury, Concluding Mavericks' Rookie Campaign Without Playoffs** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2][6]

Dallas Mavericks rookie Cooper Flagg exited Sunday's (April 12) game against the Chicago Bulls early in the second quarter due to a left ankle sprain and did not return, officially ending his standout 2025-26 season with 10 points in nine minutes[1][2
